title: Sensation and Perception
learningObjectives: Distinguish between sensation and perception and explain how they work together
Describe the basic principles of waves and wavelengths as they relate to sensory experience
Explain how the visual system processes light into meaningful images
Describe the anatomy and function of the auditory system
Identify the sensory systems responsible for taste, smell, touch, and body position
Apply Gestalt principles to explain how the brain organizes perceptual information
